description: Score AI sycophancy and child-safety risk from your terminal. Powered by sycoindex.ai.

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('./package.json'));if(!fs.existsSync('./README.md'))throw new Error('README.md is required before publish');if(!fs.existsSync('./LICENSE'))throw new Error('LICENSE is required before publish');console.log('Publishing '+pkg.name+'@'+pkg.version);"
